title: dx: env-aware docs urls in dashboard
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Home sweet localhost
gist.blurb: Dashboard documentation links now respect your local environment, making local development just a little bit smoother.
gist.summary: Updated dashboard documentation links to dynamically point to the local generation worker during development instead of hardcoding the production URL.
gist.impact: Developers running the dashboard locally will now be correctly routed to their local docs instance instead of production.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a navigator, looking at a signpost that directs traffic to 'Localhost' instead of 'Production'. Represents routing and local development.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny explorer's hat, looking at a wooden signpost with arrows pointing to 'LOCALHOST' and 'PROD'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny explorer's hat, looking at a wooden signpost with arrows pointing to 'LOCALHOST' and 'PROD'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
